headline: Considering the Chase Sapphire Reserve's 150,000-point bonus? Here are 4 easy-to-miss reasons it's a great deal
summary: The Sapphire Reserve is more than just a big bonus. Carefully considering these factors can help you easily determine if it's a good fit for you.
